Name: Nike Air Force 1 White
Short description: Sneaker trang co dien, de phoi do va phu hop su dung hang ngay.
Description: Nike Air Force 1 White la mau sneaker co dien phu hop voi nhieu phong cach khac nhau, tu di hoc, di lam den phoi do streetwear cuoi tuan. Phan upper mau trang de phoi, form giay on dinh, de chac va cam giac mang quen thuoc. San pham phu hop voi khach hang can mot doi giay ben, de ve sinh, khong loi mot va co the su dung thuong xuyen. KickZone cung cap day du size pho bien, tu van chon size truoc khi mua va ho tro doi size trong 7 ngay neu san pham con nguyen tem hop.

Name: Adidas Ultra Boost 22
Short description: Giay running em, thoang khi, phu hop chay nhe va di chuyen ca ngay.
Description: Adidas Ultra Boost 22 duoc chon cho nhom khach hang can mot doi giay running co do em tot va van de phoi voi trang phuc hang ngay. Phan dem Boost mang lai cam giac dan hoi, upper thoang khi giup ban chan thoai mai trong thoi gian dai. Mau giay phu hop voi nguoi di bo nhieu, chay nhe hoac can mot doi giay linh hoat cho lich hoc va lam viec. KickZone tu van size theo chieu dai ban chan va ho tro doi size trong vong 7 ngay.

Name: New Balance 574 Grey
Short description: Lifestyle sneaker mau xam trung tinh, dang retro de mac.
Description: New Balance 574 Grey la lua chon an toan cho nguoi thich phong cach retro, don gian va lich su. Mau xam trung tinh giup doi giay phoi duoc voi quan jeans, kaki, short hoac outfit cong so thoai mai. Form giay on dinh, phan de vua du em cho nhu cau di lai hang ngay. Day la san pham phu hop voi khach hang muon mot doi sneaker ben, khong qua noi bat nhung van co nhan dien thuong hieu ro rang.

Name: Puma RS-X Reinvention
Short description: Sneaker chunky phoi mau tre trung, tao diem nhan streetwear.
Description: Puma RS-X Reinvention phu hop voi nguoi thich dang giay chunky va mau sac noi bat. San pham co form day dan, phan de tao cam giac chac chan va thiet ke nhieu lop giup outfit basic tro nen ca tinh hon. Mau giay nay phu hop voi quan jogger, cargo, denim va ao oversize. KickZone khuyen nghi khach hang chon dung size hoac tang nua size neu thich mang rong.

Name: Converse Chuck Taylor All Star
Short description: Giay canvas unisex, nhe, de phoi voi phong cach hoc duong.
Description: Converse Chuck Taylor All Star la mau giay canvas quen thuoc voi thiet ke toi gian, de phoi va phu hop ca nam lan nu. Form giay gon, trong luong nhe, thich hop cho di hoc, di choi va phong cach vintage. Chat lieu canvas can duoc bao quan noi kho thoang va han che ngam nuoc lau. KickZone cung cap nhieu size pho bien va huong dan ve sinh rieng cho chat lieu vai.

Name: Vans Old Skool Black/White
Short description: Mau skate classic voi side stripe dac trung va de bam tot.
Description: Vans Old Skool Black White la mau giay skate classic co kha nang phoi do rat linh hoat. Phan than giay den trang de mac voi nhieu phong cach, tu casual, streetwear den outfit di hoc. De waffle bam tot, form giay gon va ben khi su dung hang ngay. San pham phu hop voi khach hang can mot doi giay co nhan dien thuong hieu ro, gia hop ly va khong loi mot.

Name: Nike Air Max 270
Short description: Giay dem Air lon o got, em va hien dai cho daily wear.
Description: Nike Air Max 270 co thiet ke hien dai voi tui Air lon o got, tao cam giac em ro khi di chuyen. Mau giay phu hop voi nguoi thich sneaker nang dong, co the su dung cho di bo, tap nhe va phoi do hang ngay. Phan upper thoang, form om vua phai va de giay noi bat giup san pham tro thanh diem nhan cua outfit. KickZone khuyen nghi thu size truoc neu ban co ban chan be ngang.

Name: Adidas Stan Smith White
Short description: Lifestyle sneaker toi gian, trang xanh, phu hop di hoc va cong so.
Description: Adidas Stan Smith White la mau lifestyle sneaker toi gian lay cam hung tu giay tennis. Tong trang xanh de phoi, phu hop voi quan jeans, chinos va trang phuc lich su hang ngay. Thiet ke gon giup doi giay khong qua the thao nhung van tre trung. San pham phu hop voi khach hang can mot doi giay sach se, de mang, de phoi va co tinh ung dung cao trong nhieu hoan canh.
